blockers.workaround: On resume: read git diff to reconstruct what changed; re-spawn plan-checker as authoritative verifier.

blockers.description: Plan 09 (00-09-PLAN.md) NOT in modified file set — BLOCKER-8 (remove SEO-11 from Plan 09 requirements frontmatter) may not have been applied.
blockers.workaround: On resume: grep Plan 09 frontmatter for `SEO-11`; if present, edit out manually before re-running checker.

decisions.decision: Skip Pattern Mapper agent for Phase 0
decisions.rationale: Greenfield repo — no source files exist to map analogs from. Will produce PATTERNS.md in Phase 1.
ROADMAP explicitly marks Phase 0 `UI hint: no` — primitives + placeholder tokens only, no visible sections.

decisions.decision: Skip Schema Push gate for Phase 0
decisions.rationale: No ORM in scope. SvelteKit content collections use file-system mdsvex/Velite — no Drizzle/Prisma/Payload/Supabase/TypeORM.

decisions.decision: Inject Security Threat Model with 6 IDs (T-00-meta, jsonld, crawl, stub, htmlaudit, deploy) into planner prompt
decisions.rationale: Default `security_enforcement=true`; every plan must include `<threat_model>` block.
RESEARCH.md contains `## Validation Architecture` section per Nyquist workflow §5.5; pre-populating gives planner explicit per-task verification map to align against.

decisions.decision: Suggest 8–10 plan decomposition aligned to RESEARCH.md architectural responsibility map
decisions.rationale: Granularity = fine per STATE.md; ROADMAP success criteria #1–#5 naturally split across infra → primitives → routes → CI → deploy.

decisions.decision: Correct VALIDATION.md SEO ID map mid-workflow (warning #14 from checker)
decisions.rationale: Initial VALIDATION.md used non-authoritative SEO IDs. Fixed against REQUIREMENTS.md lines 28–36: SEO-04=canonical, SEO-05=hreflang, SEO-06=OG, SEO-07=sitemap, SEO-08=robots, SEO-09=dateModified.

next_action: Re-spawn gsd-plan-checker against current on-disk plans (iteration 2/3) to verify revision-planner's edits actually resolved BLOCKER-1..7 and to confirm BLOCKER-8 status on Plan 09. Use the same prompt as iteration 1, plus an explicit note: `Iteration 2 — verify the 6 blockers from iteration 1 are structurally fixed; flag any blocker not fully resolved.`
context_notes: Resumed from 5h limit, completed `/gsd-resume-work` reconciliation, then `/gsd-plan-phase 0` end-to-end through planner + first checker pass + revision-planner mid-write. Plans landed on disk via planner self-commit (752a3fd); revision-planner did not commit. Checker found 7 blockers (1 D-09 contradiction, 1 invalid Svelte syntax for <html lang>, 3 requirement coverage gaps SEO-09/FND-03/SEO-03, 1 dependency-graph gap Plan 04→02, 2 double-claims FND-06/SEO-11) + 5 warnings (Plan 08 scope, SCH-07 empty FAQ, og:locale, scope-sanity, VALIDATION SEO IDs). VALIDATION.md SEO IDs already corrected. Revision-planner was given a structured fix list and acknowledged each blocker before session cut. On disk evidence: 6 plans + VALIDATION.md modified with substantial diff sizes (10–116 lines per file) — strongly suggests revision-planner reached most blockers. Plan 09 absent from diff list is the only structural concern.
